name: My City Builders, Inc.
business: My City Builders, Inc. focuses on real estate transactions, particularly the acquisition, development, and sale or rental of low-income housing. Its investment approach includes acquiring, refurbishing, and selling traditional foreclosures; purchasing, developing, and renting properties in Land Banks; and acquiring, refurbishing, or developing homes available through HECM pools. The company markets its properties to low-income individuals and families.

exposures.sentence: Through RAC, the Company focuses on real estate transactions, particularly the acquisition, development, and sale or rental of low-income housing.

catalysts.event: Finalized purchase of two additional lots in Gadsden, Alabama, bringing total properties in East Gadsden to twenty-two.
catalysts.sentence: On April 25,2024, RAC finalized the purchase of two additional lots in Gadsden, Alabama bringing the total properties owned in East Gadsden to twenty-two.

catalysts.event: Entered into land purchase agreement in Glencoe, Alabama, with plans to build seven to eight duplex apartments.
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2024, RAC Gadsden LLC entered into a land purchase agreement in Glencoe Alabama.

catalysts.event: Finalized purchase of one home in Laurel, Mississippi.
catalysts.sentence: On October 18, 2024, RAC finalized the purchase of one home in Laurel Mississippi in amount of $8,021.

catalysts.event: Entered into interest purchase agreement for 50% ownership of a property in Laurel, MS, increasing ownership to 100%.
catalysts.sentence: On November 26, 2024, The Company entered into an interest purchase agreement with Frank Campanaro in connection with settlement agreement dated June 2024 for 50% ownership of a property located at 1320 N 5 th Avenue, Laurel, MS in amount of $41,565 in cash.

catalysts.event: Acquired a second piece of land in Gadsden, Alabama for construction of new residential homes.
catalysts.sentence: On February 27, 2025, the Company acquired a second piece of land in Gadsden, Alabama for construction of new residential homes for cost of $77,115.

catalysts.event: Entered into share purchase agreement to sell 100% of RAC Real Estate Acquisition Corp. to RAC Merger LLC.
catalysts.sentence: On July 8, 2025, the Company and RAC Merger LLC ( RAC Merger ) entered into a share purchase agreement in order to sell 100% issued and outstanding shares of RAC Real Estate Acquisition Corp., to RAC Merger for a total purchase amount of $2,374,896.

catalysts.event: Entered into asset purchase agreement to acquire 4 acres of land in Glencoe, Alabama in exchange for a 3-year secured promissory note.
catalysts.sentence: On October 31, 2025, the Company and RAC Gadsden LLC entered into an asset purchase agreement, in which, the Company acquired 4 acres of land in Glencoe, Alabama in exchange for a 3-year secured promissory note in the amount of $350,000 with an interest rate of 9.5% per annum.
